title: Glowing Emissive Ores - Fusion
description: This is an add-on to my Glowing Emissive Ores resource pack which supports over 250 mods, this resource pack adds support for Fusion.
body:
### Overview
This is an add-on for my Glowing Emissive Ores resource pack which **supports over 250 mods**, this resource pack adds support for Fusion, allowing you to use the main resource pack on more versions of minecraft.

### ⚠️ Important
Make sure "GEO - Fusion" is placed above "GEO" on the resource pack screen.

If you are using this with the [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) mod, two of the ores will require you to reload the game after enabling "Glowing Emissive Ores" for them to use the emissive textures (Better End Potato Edition doesn't have this issue).

### Requirements:


- [Glowing Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-emissive-ores)
- [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)

You don't need to read the requirements for "Glowing Emissive Ores", you only need the requirements listed above.
